# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://staging-app.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      second: 20
      minute: 600
      hour: 10000

services:
  - name: public-api
    url: http://public-api:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          second: 10
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000

    routes:
      - name: public-api-open
        paths:
          - /v1/public
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://admin.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Accept-Language
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 5
              minute: 120

      - name: public-api-protected
        paths:
          - /v1
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 8
              minute: 240
              hour: 4000

  - name: admin-api
    url: http://admin-api:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          second: 5
          minute: 120
          hour: 2000

    routes:
      - name: admin-api-login
        paths:
          - /admin/login
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://admin.example.com"
              methods:
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Accept-Language
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 2
              minute: 30

      - name: admin-api-protected
        paths:
          - /admin
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 3
              minute: 60
              hour: 1000
